title: trifolium glanduliferum var. glanduliferum
intro: Trifolium glanduliferum var. glanduliferum, also known as glandular clover, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of glandular clover include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Glandular clover is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
